message:
beads: Add 5 new EPICs with tasks, close 13 scope creep beads

New EPICs created:
- bd-7ny3: Progressive CLI Discovery System (6 tasks)
- bd-f815: Agent Activity Timeline Visualization (4 tasks)
- bd-1t8p: Local LLM Support via Ollama (4 tasks)
- bd-3s2f: Webhook System for External Integrations (4 tasks)
- bd-3pbe: Comprehensive Audit Log System (4 tasks)

Closed as scope creep or low value:
- bd-2xt8: --ultrathink flag (trivially achievable manually)
- bd-3ddk: --confirm flag (defeats automation)
- bd-276n: replay (duplicate of session profiles)
- bd-f0p5: export-prompts (covered by logging/cass)
- bd-24m4: --append flag (edge case)
- bd-3hl3: --stagger-individualized (marginal)
- bd-2591: broadcast (achievable with existing commands)
- bd-3kmf: --chain (over-engineering)
- bd-377a: review-queue (over-engineering)
- bd-29nc: rebalance (over-engineering)
- bd-2vcs: scale (over-engineering)
- bd-2q6n: --by-name (dependent on naming feature)
- bd-2e6n: --role flag (users can define own roles)
- bd-20kv: smart agent selection (user judgment better)

All new beads have dependency links. No cycles detected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
